response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric distributed systems work, making them a poor fit for the core technical requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source leadership and mentorship through workshops and projects
Proven ability to own ambiguous projects (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent tooling)
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform design or leadership in AWS/GCP/Azure at scale
Lacks documented experience in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or establishing architectural patterns
